title: Meta-Learning in Neural Networks: A Survey
description:
Successful applications have been demonstrated in
areas spanning few-shot image recognition[16,20], unsupervised learning[21],
data efficient[22,23]and self-directed[24]reinforcement learning (RL),
hyperparameter optimization[17], and neural architecture search (NAS)[18,25,26].

title: Deep Learning for Time Series Classification and Extrinsic Regression: A Current Survey
description:
Deep learning realised the promise of joint feature
and model learning[13], providing a huge improvement in performance for many
tasks[1,3].
